titleStmt.title: SII 29.188: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 188. (A.R. No. B. 114 of 1961-62.) BŌDHAN, BODHAN TALUK, NIZAMABAD DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar [No. 3] on the top of the Fort to the north of the old village.
This nishidhige inscription carries an eulogy of the jaina muni Chandraprabha-ācharya and records his death by samādhividhi.
It is dated in chronogram-Śara-randhra-anka Śaka 995, Paridhāvi, Bhādrapada, Krishṇāshṭami, Sūrivāsara. It corresponds to 1072 A.D., September 8, (Saturday).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
(ho)aṟuṁ vēda(pādaṁ)
taraṁgadatapaṁ bārhyaṁ
gamāṟiṁ tivirāṟuṁ
paṁcamahāvritaṁ
tabi kabba . modala bhōdaṁ(pri)
vai kammāriyaṁ kīṟalliṟa
tuṁbiyaduttara guṇiṁ lō
kōttarakhyātavī mū
ṟu lōkadiḷādu baṇni
sadarār candra prabhācā
ryyaraṁ . kṣame saṁmā
rddana vṛtti . satyaniya
maṁ saucaṁ . tapaṁ . tyāga
saṁyamamaṁ . brahmya ma
kiṁcanatva . menesandī
pattu dharmaṁgaḷutta
mamaṁgīkṛta . mā
dimadhyamāvasānaṁ

tammoḷorppiṟda saṁya
migaḷ cārucaritra
rastamisida(r) caṁdra
prabhar suprabhar .
śauryyaṁ dorppamanuṟva
daṁkiḍisimōhaṁ . kāṁti
yaṁ tūḷdi . tātparyyaṁ
geydu tapaśrō tōpaca
yadōḷ ratnatrayārādha
na kāryyavyāpi śatābda
meydudina ṣiḷācitta
raṁ saṁdudā(śca)ryya saṁdhisa
mādhiyaṁssaritamuṁ
caṁdraprabhā cāryyaraṁ .
śararaṁdhraṁkā sakābda bhā
drapadadoḷ kṛṣṇāṣṭami
sūri vāsararmātā pari
dhāvi saṣavarisaṁ caṁdra
prabhākhyavratīśvara ruddā
ma samādhi (hoṁda)raviya
sāśātiyaṁ sāre bōdhara
(r) bōdhanadoḷ viśuddha(mata)
(ṁvi)diṁdrāspadageydidar .

— śrīyapāṁsaṁ pratisōca
tikṣiti taḷasiḷaṁtapaḥ
puṣkaḷaṁ kirmmakāṁti tati
di dāśruta vidāṁ saṁsā
rapārasya śāṁtacaṁdrapra
bhadēva nāmamunaya
śvaṁdrāṁsusatitrayaḥ jiṁ
yāsujditamānamōha
madanāḥ midyatpanirmma
dinaḥ . jīyāścaṁdraprabhā cā
ryyarjinayōgi gaṇāgraṇi
gajjapujjeyacāryyatapaṁ sē
nuviḷayāniḷa . lōkaikotta
rabār saṁyamānidassaṁpū
rṇnavākśruka vikōdārata
pānika bukajana prastutya
vidyānavatāra kṣīratuṣā
ra bhāsura yaśōlīḷānide
ssatunaḥ . śrīcaṁdra prabhā
yōgināsakēdaśāstrāṁ bhōni
dēḥ sadyaṇu .

saptavacōdvini mayābadra
pastēva saputu vataca
viditā kuḷapūpatā
ḷa caṁdraprabhavratipati
(sa)ṁvasadyaṇunāṁ saṁkhyāṁ
mavēlenaka (mi) catura
narnupi . sakaḷakṣāca (ra)
rājarājitatiraṁṭanabu
ratṁakraṁtāpurakoṭyāti
ta pādapadmaṁ sugaḷamā
tyaryya māyādi tīvra
kaṣāyanuna pāvaka (rē)
rahitardātikratu dṛtyē
kasadi kēḷisteyde tapō(śi)
yāga nirataścandraprabhā
svāmigaḷu gajagajāḷda śrī
vallakā Udāḷane kākēśadi
ṣā kādigadē ponnama
sa samahadā grēsaraṁ
sādisirege rmmagra(ṇi)ta vi
ṣadi tanujagaṁ dāmāhā
ge pennaga naṁdyaneyati
kāmani tripuru hara śrī
dharmma nipāpaka
Digital edition of SII 29.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
